title: Run real paired baseline and RepoBrief agent trials
goal: Execute the frozen benchmark in isolated baseline and RepoBrief-augmented conditions with the separately qualified instrumented runner, provider-reported tokens and immutable transcripts.

approval.note: Run only after RAB-V1-T002E fixes and verifies all live-preparation contracts and RAB-V1-T002F separately authorizes, executes once and verifies a fresh cost-bounded pair.

acceptance.assertion: The bound and separately verified runner records exact provider and model identity, sampling settings, provider-reported input/output tokens, tool calls, timestamps and complete or cryptographically bound transcripts for every valid run.
Each condition starts in a fresh session and isolated checkout with no transcript, cache, memory or result transfer between baseline and treatment.
All 24 fixed cases are attempted in both conditions and in the registered balanced order; invalid, failed and timed-out runs remain visible and are not silently retried into success.
The complete paired benchmark is repeated with identical configuration and taskset so directional reproducibility can be assessed.
Requests, receipts, transcripts, target repository commits, RepoBrief manifests, environment identity and aggregate evaluation are hash-bound and published as reviewable artifacts.
The run reports outcomes without changing default routing, tool policy or RepoBrief adoption state.

metadata.initial_blocker: RAB-V1-T002B ended fail-closed after a baseline retry and treatment budget stop. The 96-run benchmark remains prohibited until T002C qualifies the one-shot orchestrator and T002D produces one valid newly authorized pair.
does_not_establish: answer correctness outside the fixed taskset
metadata.current_blocker: RAB-V1-T002D consumed its one-shot authorization but failed locally before provider dispatch. RAB-V1-T002E must harden the exact live preparation contracts, and RAB-V1-T002F must then receive a new separate authorization and produce one valid pair. The 96-run benchmark remains prohibited and unstarted.
unlock_conditions: RAB-V1-T002E is verified without provider use
RAB-V1-T002F receives a new separate reviewed live authorization
exactly one valid fresh baseline/treatment pair is completed without retry
T002F evidence is verified in Bureau
